class.name: GDKDisplay
class.description: Wraps the small [code]XDisplay[/code] surface from the PC GDK. Provides HDR mode probing/enable and idle display-timeout deferrals. All methods return [GDKResult] with the success payload in [code]GDKResult.data[/code].

method.name: try_enable_hdr_mode
method.description: Tries to put the connected display into HDR mode. Wraps [code]XDisplayTryEnableHdrMode[/code]. On success [code]data[/code] is a [Dictionary] with [code]mode: int[/code] (one of [enum HdrMode]). When [code]mode == HDR_MODE_ENABLED[/code], [code]data[/code] also contains an [code]info[/code] [Dictionary] with [code]min_tone_map_luminance[/code], [code]max_tone_map_luminance[/code], and [code]max_full_frame_tone_map_luminance[/code] floats. Returns [code]invalid_preference[/code] for unknown preference values, [code]not_initialized[/code] before [method GDK.initialize].

method.name: acquire_timeout_deferral
method.description: Acquires a display timeout deferral so the system will not idle out the display while the returned [GDKDisplayTimeoutDeferral] is held. Wraps [code]XDisplayAcquireTimeoutDeferral[/code]. On success [code]data[/code] is a [GDKDisplayTimeoutDeferral]; release it via [method GDKDisplayTimeoutDeferral.release] or let it free naturally. Returns [code]not_initialized[/code] before [method GDK.initialize] or [code]acquire_timeout_deferral_failed[/code] on HRESULT failure.

constants.constant: HDR mode could not be determined ([code]XDisplayHdrModeResult::Unknown[/code]).
HDR mode is enabled on the connected display ([code]XDisplayHdrModeResult::Enabled[/code]).
HDR mode is disabled or unavailable ([code]XDisplayHdrModeResult::Disabled[/code]).
Prefer enabling HDR even if the display refresh rate must drop ([code]XDisplayHdrModePreference::PreferHdr[/code]).
Prefer keeping the current refresh rate, only enable HDR when it does not require a refresh-rate change ([code]XDisplayHdrModePreference::PreferRefreshRate[/code]).
